	Create sharp, compelling and innovative online and offline campaigns by way of advertising company’s products and services on online platforms
	Handle clients complaints and issues and grant speedy resolutions
	Constantly seek innovative actions that will drive up sales phenomenally.
	Prospect for clients; market the company's estate lands to potential clients.
	Invite and ensure attendance of new or propespective consultants to our weekly trainings

	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree.
	Should have 1 year of experience in marketing needed although we will train you adequately.

	Should be a respectful and positive-minded individual with a pleasing personality.

	Should be well oriented in Computing & Information Technology viz-a-viz online marketing, online advertising campaign, email marking, marketing on social media e.g Facebook, Twitter, and other popular online platforms

Account Officer Job at Lexshield Properties Limited




        
    

        
        Lexshield Properties Limited is a Real Estate Development Company opening up new areas in cities across the country, to provide exclusive estates with unique designs that ensure comfort and security at very affordable rates. It is made up of professionals with diverse experience that create an innovative working environment for young talents to thrive. Our concern is to make housing and Real Estate products a reality for all average Nigerians

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	A leading Real Estate Company located in Omole Phase 1, Ikeja, Lagos requires the services of an Account Officer.


 Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate financial records and bookkeeping
	Prepare and present financial reports (weekly and monthly)
	Monitor cash flow, expenses, and income
	Handle invoicing, receivables, and payables
	Reconcile bank statements and resolve discrepancies
	Ensure compliance with tax and regulatory requirements
	Support budgeting and financial planning processes
	Maintain proper documentation of all financial transactions


Requirements


	Minimum of HND/ BSc in Accounting
	Proven experience as an Account Officer/Accountant in a similar role
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and practices
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software
	High level of accuracy and attention to detail
	Strong organizational and time management skills
	Candidates residing within, Ikeja, Ojodu, Ogba, Magodo, Ketu and its environment will be given priority.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
